# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud database security.
# Category: cloud_database_security

$schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
resources:
  - type: "Microsoft.Sql/servers"
    apiVersion: "2021-02-01-preview"
    name: "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      administratorLogin: "[parameters('administratorLogin')]"
      administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]"
      version: "12.0"
      sslEnforcement: "Enabled"
    resources:
      - type: "databases"
        apiVersion: "2021-02-01-preview"
        name: "[parameters('databaseName')]"
        properties:
          edition: "Basic"
          requestedServiceObjective: "Basic"
          maxSizeBytes: "2147483648" # 2 GB
  - type: "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules"
    apiVersion: "2021-02-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/AllowAllWindowsAzureIps')]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "0.0.0.0"
      endIpAddress: "0.0.0.0"
  - type: "Microsoft.Sql/servers/virtualNetworkRules"
    apiVersion: "2021-02-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/vnetRule')]"
    properties:
      virtualNetworkSubnetId: "[parameters('vnetSubnetId')]"
      ignoreMissingVnetServiceEndpoint: true
parameters:
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The name of the SQL server."
  databaseName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The name of the SQL database."
  location:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The location for the SQL server."
  administratorLogin:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The administrator login for the SQL server."
  administratorLoginPassword:
    type: securestring
    metadata:
      description: "The password for the SQL server administrator."
  vnetSubnetId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The resource ID of the virtual network subnet."
